request_payload.exposure_text: As a grandmother who remembers the Cold War, I worry about our national security. The world is more dangerous than ever, and we can't afford to be unprepared. Mandatory service would ensure we have a strong defense and a more disciplined society. It's not about taking away freedoms - it's about protecting them. Our allies are counting on us to do our part. #NationalSecurity #ServiceMatters
